authority: local TaxKit documentation-policy, documentation, lint-configuration, and command-wiring changes only
acceptedOutcome: Fresh-context acceptance passed for the mechanical foundation: machine-readable documentation ownership, bounded Effect-native checks, maintainer lifecycle metadata, package README coverage, exact runtime allowlists, and deliberately opaque public status semantics.
scope: Effect-native tracked and nonignored-untracked documentation inventory
bounded human and JSON receipts with a complete ignored report
current maintainer metadata, link, command, generated-owner, and package-README checks

impactLedger.acceptance: The decoded owner graph separates public, maintainer, generated, package-manifest, and manual-snapshot classes; focused fixtures cover failures, current versus historical handling, opaque draft status, package coverage, links, and filtered Bun commands.

impactLedger.surface: maintainer docs, root/app/package READMEs, architecture, and standards

impactLedger.surface: evidence, bounded report lifecycle, and audit routing
impactLedger.acceptance: The candidate is routed from the evidence index; complete sanitized checker detail is written to ignored tmp/docs-policy-report.json while bounded receipts remain legible in console or JSON mode.

impactLedger.surface: public MDX, public navigation, and public status semantics
impactLedger.acceptance: No public MDX or navigation path changes. All 62 public paths are inventoried, while draft remains an opaque product value with no inferred publication, deployment, rendering, or availability consequence.

impactLedger.decision: Owner contract change; generated artifacts preserved
impactLedger.acceptance: The owner contract names Fumadocs and OpenAPI source, generated, test, route, and command relationships; this slice regenerates no tracked generated artifact.
Every current apps/** or packages/** manifest is inventoried before public classification and requires the nearest package README.

Portable Effect lint covers tools/documentation sources; only check.runtime.ts is added to the exact decoding, encoding-egress, runtime-execution, process, console, Bun-adapter, and Bun-runtime boundary arrays. Repository lint passes without inline suppressions.
check:docs, its typecheck, and documentation tests are root-owned. Existing .github/workflows/quality.yml already invokes bun run verification, so no duplicated workflow step is needed.
HGI-208 remains the sole owner for the TaxKit-local docs-maintainer skill after full HGI-202 acceptance.

impactLedger.surface: runbooks, release proof, provider operations, and external systems
impactLedger.acceptance: HGI-203 and HGI-204 remain the named owners. This local mechanical slice performs no provider, publication, release, deployment, or recovery operation.
HGI-202-S1 is explicitly partial; HGI-202 remains pending on the deferred public draft-semantics decision.
The slice changes repository tooling and documentation governance only; it changes no package-facing runtime or published package contract.

verification.result: 0 violations across 571 inspected files, including 120 maintainer and 62 public paths before this candidate receipt was added.

verification.check: bun run check:docs:types and bun run test:documentation
verification.result: Typecheck passed and seven focused tests passed with 15 assertions, including proof that a root script cannot mask a missing filtered-workspace script.
Repository paths, documentation policy, Effect language service, lint, format, skill tests, development and production Knip, and all 23 typecheck/build tasks passed.
Documentation, repository-path, docs-boundary, Oxlint, and all 19 workspace test tasks passed.

verification.check: bun run docs:validate, bun run check:repository-paths, bun run test:skills, bun run lint, bun run format:check, and git diff --check
verification.result: Focused documentation content, repository path, skill, lint, format, and patch-integrity gates passed.

An independent reviewer reproduced the bounded JSON check, docs typecheck/tests, lint, full verification, and patch integrity; verified exact allowlists, Effect/Schema boundaries, public opacity, complete impact routing, and all non-claims; and found no remaining blocker after two concrete corrections.

limitations: HGI-202 is not complete because the product owner has not accepted the consequence of public draft status.

The root check and fix scripts request type-aware Ultracite, but the optional oxlint-tsgolint adapter is not installed or qualified; HGI-205 owns adapter qualification and the existing repository-wide findings.
Local mechanical checks cannot establish public availability, publication, deployment, runtime behaviour, external consumer state, or public status semantics.
nonClaims: No public MDX, navigation, package runtime, release, publication, deployment, provider, environment, credential, or external planning system was changed or accessed.
This candidate does not complete HGI-202 or unblock HGI-208 through HGI-206.
rollback: Revert this bounded HGI-202-S1 candidate slice; preserve HGI-200, HGI-201, HGI-207, retained historical evidence, and all public content.
nextTrigger: Publish exact semantic Git identity and a separate validation/readback receipt, then request the public draft-semantics decision required for HGI-202 completion.
